name: Alpaca MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Alpaca MCP server enabling AI assistants to trade stocks, ETFs, crypto, and options, manage portfolios, access real-time and historical market data, and handle watchlists through natural language.
use_cases: Place and manage stock, ETF, crypto, and options orders via AI assistant
Monitor account balances, positions, and buying power
Retrieve real-time quotes, historical bars, and options Greeks
Manage watchlists and track corporate actions (dividends, splits, earnings)
Build AI-powered trading workflows with paper or live accounts
best_when: You have an Alpaca brokerage account and want an AI assistant to execute trades, monitor positions, and analyze market data through natural language.
avoid_when: You need multi-broker support, backtesting capabilities, or are not comfortable giving an AI agent access to real trading endpoints.

auth.notes: Requires ALPACA_API_KEY and ALPACA_SECRET_KEY env vars. Free paper trading keys available. ALPACA_PAPER_TRADE env var toggles between paper and live mode. Credentials in MCP client config override .env file.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free paper trading. Live trading requires funded Alpaca brokerage account. Some market data may require paid subscriptions.
pricing.notes: MIT licensed. MCP server is free. Paper trading is free. Live trading requires Alpaca account funding. Market data tiers vary.

performance.rate_limits: Subject to Alpaca API rate limits (200 requests/minute for trading API)

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No explicit documentation on error formats. As an official Alpaca product, likely returns Alpaca API error codes but not documented at MCP layer.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Order placement is NOT idempotent by default - duplicate calls could place duplicate orders. Critical risk for agent usage.
known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL: Order placement is not idempotent - retries can create duplicate orders with real financial consequences
Paper/live toggle is a single env var - misconfiguration could execute real trades
close_all_positions is extremely destructive and should never be auto-invoked by agents
Options trading (multi-leg) is complex and errors could be costly
No built-in confirmation step before trade execution

security_score_components.security_notes: Trading API MCP. API key + secret. CRITICAL: paper trading for testing, live trading for real money. Restrict to paper trading until thoroughly tested. Never expose live keys.
